title: Issues 2075 2076 doctor compact output

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.requested_outcome: Implement issues #2075 and #2076: make doctor/status default JSON repair-oriented and compact, while moving detailed lifecycle, payload-closure, and compatible provenance-drift diagnostics behind verbose output or selectors.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Keep this slice to doctor/status diagnostic output shape and tests. Do not implement the root AGENTS.md repair command (#2073), local-only adoption flow (#2074), ordinary-command IR migration (#2044), or close parent issue #1969 in this PR.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Exact compact field names and helper boundaries, provided action-required drift remains visible by default and full detail remains reachable with --verbose or --select.
canonical_core.escalate_when: A correct fix requires changing lifecycle mutation semantics, module install/upgrade behavior, or selector contracts outside doctor/status output projection.
canonical_core.next_action: Implement the compact doctor/status projection and focused regressions for default, verbose, selector, healthy compatible-drift, and action-required drift paths.
proof_expectations: uv run python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py doctor --target . --format json
uv run python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py doctor --target . --select payload_closure_plan,installed_state_compatibility --format json

uv run python scripts/run_agentic_workspace.py implement --target . --changed src/agentic_workspace/workspace_runtime_core.py src/agentic_workspace/workspace_runtime_primitives.py tests/test_workspace_doctor_status_cli.py tests/test_workspace_cli.py .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/issue-2075-2076-doctor-compact.plan.json .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml --task "Implement issues #2075 and #2076 doctor compact output" --format json
completion_criteria: Default doctor/status JSON keeps repair fields and compact summaries first and does not repeat full healthy payload/provenance detail.
Verbose doctor/status JSON still exposes the full lifecycle, installed-state compatibility, and payload-closure diagnostics.
Selectors can retrieve full installed_state_compatibility and payload_closure_plan even when the default output is compact.
Action-required payload/provenance drift remains visible in default doctor output with a concrete next action.
Issues #2075/#2076 are implemented, validated, and routed to a first stacked PR.
canonical_core.continuation_owner: GitHub issues #2073, #2074, #2044, and #1969 remain separate follow-on lanes after this stacked PR.

goal: Implement #2075/#2076 by making doctor/status default JSON compact and repair-oriented while preserving full detail through --verbose and --select.
non_goals: Leave adjacent backlog or follow-on work out of this plan.

intent.escalation: Escalate if output compaction requires changing lifecycle mutation behavior or broad command contracts.

durable_residue.learned constraint: Doctor/status default output should not repeat full compatible payload/provenance detail when a selector or verbose command can serve it.
durable_residue.motivation worth preserving: Keep default diagnostic packets action-first so ordinary agent loops are cheaper and less noisy.

closure_check.accepted values: Accepted values: slice status = complete|completed|bounded slice complete; larger-intent status = closed|complete|completed for archive-and-close or open|partial|unfinished for archive-but-keep-lane-open; closure decision = archive-and-close|archive-but-keep-lane-open. Prefer `agentic-planning archive-plan <plan> --prepare-closeout` before hand-editing closeout fields.

improvement_signal_review.guidance: At closeout, report AW smoothness/helpfulness gaps, better-way signals, unused-feature reflections, and places AW could help more. Route each concrete signal to exactly one owner class unless explicitly split, or mark no_signal_found after checking.
